interestingFact: Japan has more than 6,800 islands and is home to the world's oldest continuously operating company, founded in 578 AD.
Brazil contains around 60% of the Amazon Rainforest, the largest tropical rainforest in the world.
Canada has the longest coastline of any country in the world.
India is the largest democracy in the world and has the world's highest cricket stadium.
Australia is the only country that is also a continent.
Egypt is home to the Great Pyramid of Giza, one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World.
Iceland runs almost entirely on renewable energy and has no mosquitoes.
China has the largest population in the world and built the Great Wall stretching over 21,000 km.
Italy has more UNESCO World Heritage Sites than any other country.
South Africa has three capital cities: Pretoria, Cape Town, and Bloemfontein.
